title: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) Deutsche Bank 2023 Technology Conference (Transcript)
text: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC ) Deutsche Bank 2023 Technology Conference August 31, 2023 4:15 PM ET Company Participants David Goeckeler - CEO Peter Andrew - IR Conference Call Participants Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Sidney Ho Okay. Well, good afternoon, everyone.

title: Western Digital to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC) today announced management participation in the following upcoming investor conference: Event: Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference Date: Tuesday, September 5, 2023 at 3:45 p.m. PT / 6:45 p.m. ET The management presentation will be available as a live webcast, accessible through Western Digital's Investor Relations website at investor.wdc.com. An archived replay will be accessible through the website shortly af.

title: Western Digital to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC) today announced management participation in the following upcoming investor conferences: Event: Deutsche Bank 2023 Technology Conference Date: Thursday, August 31, 2023 at 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET Event: Evercore ISI Semiconductor & Semiconductor Equipment Conference Date: Thursday, September 7, 2023 at 6:00 a.m. PT / 9:00 a.m. ET Each management presentation will be available as a live webcast, accessible through Wes.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Q4 Earnings Beat, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Western Digital's (WDC) fourth-quarter performance is affected due to weak performance across all segments.
